description: Dark flagship concept palette for SignalCode. This is not yet a generated scheme input.

carbon.description: Neutral graphite substrate and shell frame.

chalk.description: Readable carrier neutrals and page stabilizers.

slate.description: Quiet guidance and secondary structural neutral.

amber.description: Measured numeric warmth and method-side warmth.

voltage.description: Cool callable anchor and structural lighthouse.

citron.description: Yellow-green signal family for visible classification.

jade.description: Living support lane for strings and member rhythm.

notes: The substrate stays neutral-dark so the identity comes from syntax landmarks rather than background tint.
Keyword, function, and type are intentionally farther apart than in HearthCode.
Yellow-green is used as signal energy, not as environmental mood.
